content: NexusMods API auth: OAuth2 + PKCE (S256) is now the required/recommended path for new apps; legacy personal API key still works but is deprecated for new integrations. OAuth flow uses a custom redirect URI such as nxm://oauth/callback with client_id, response_type, scope, state, code_challenge. The older websocket-based SSO (used by MO2/Vortex) obtains an API key without manual paste. Rate limit: 300 req quota (600 premium), bursts allowed, recovers 1 req/sec. GraphQL v2 API is mostly accessible unauthenticated; some endpoints need OAuth token. nxm:// protocol handler enables one-click install from browser.
